notes: Logic references an auction lot table (lot.closing_at, lot.status) but baseline has no nbfc_auction_lots / auction_lots table. Implementer must add the lots table or document it as an upstream dependency before coding this unit.
Logic also writes to the admin audit log (action codes); depends_on should include E-071.
No cross-doc gap (G-01..G-10) directly impacts nbfc_auction_lot_actions.
